title: AgentDoc Impacted-By Query
description: Answer to "this code changed — which knowledge is now suspect?": every verified claim and accepted decision whose declared impacts: paths or evidence paths exactly match a changed file, each with one impact-review proof obligation. Emitted by `adoc impacted-by` and the `adoc_impacted_by` MCP tool. A pure function of the graph artifact and the changed-path set: no evaluation date, no recompile, no globs. Records are sorted by Object ID; reasons by (matched_path, kind, via_source_object). See ROADMAP-V6.md §V6.3 and ADR-0038.

changed_paths.description: The normalized changed-path set the query ran against: repo-relative, sorted ascending, deduplicated — for both input shapes (explicit paths and --ref).

proof_obligations.description: One impact-review obligation per impacted record (required_evidence: ["source_code"]), merged and sorted by (object_id, reason).

diagnostics.description: Input and artifact-load diagnostics (impacted.invalid_path, impacted.ref_unresolvable, impacted.git_unavailable, io.artifact_*). Impact findings themselves are data, not diagnostics.

kind.description: Only verified subjects appear: `claim` (status verified) or `decision` (status accepted).

reasons.description: Why the changed set implicates this object — deduplicated; one record per object regardless of reason count.

kind.description: `impacts_path`: the object's declared impacts: list contains the changed path. `evidence_path`: an inline source_code/test evidence value equals the changed path, or the path of a referenced source object does.

via_source_object.description: The referenced `source` object's id when the evidence path was resolved through an evidence_ref. Absent for declared impacts: paths and inline evidence values.
